title: Hunger and desire the 'vitamin' for Arsenal fans' tension
summary: Arsenal faced criticism after losing to Bournemouth and will confront Manchester City with mounting pressure on manager Mikel Arteta to maintain composure and focus on the pitch.
content: Arsenal were booed off after their Premier League defeat by Bournemouth - and boss Mikel Arteta will not want tension to seep on to the pitch against Manchester City.

zh.title: 饥饿和渴望是阿森纳球迷紧张情绪的"维生素"
zh.summary: 阿森纳在输给伯恩茅斯后面临批评,将对阵曼城,经理米克尔·阿尔特塔维持冷静和专注于场上表现的压力不断增加。

title: Wesley sparks USWNT to 3-0 victory over Japan
summary: Kennedy Wesley scored her first international goal as the United States defeated Japan 3-0 in a friendly match, demonstrating strong offensive performance from the USWNT.
content: Kennedy Wesley recorded her first international goal to lead the United States to a 3-0 friendly win over Japan on Friday night in Commerce City, Colorado.

zh.title: 韦斯利助美国女足3-0战胜日本
zh.summary: 肯尼迪·韦斯利在友谊赛中打进她的首粒国际进球,美国以3-0击败日本,展现了美国女足的强劲进攻表现。

title: Copa final: Griezmann's emotional last dance
summary: Antoine Griezmann faces an emotional Copa del Rey final against his former club Real Sociedad, marking his final weeks with Atlético Madrid before departing.
content: Antoine Griezmann said he is soaking up an emotional week ahead of the Copa del Rey final against his former club, Real Sociedad, as he enters his final weeks with Atlético Madrid.

zh.title: 国王杯决赛:格里兹曼的情感告别之舞
zh.summary: 安托万·格里兹曼将在国王杯决赛中对阵前俱乐部皇家社会,这是他在马德里竞技队的最后几周,也标志着他离队前的情感告别。

title: 👀 Europe's top leagues: What's left to play for?
summary: European top leagues face critical final weeks as teams battle for major honors, Champions League qualification, and survival, with significant implications for league standings across the continent.
content: How are the battles for major honors, Champions League spots and relegation shaping up across the continent? Here's everything you need to know.

zh.title: 👀 欧洲顶级联赛：还有什么悬念？
zh.summary: 欧洲顶级联赛正迎来关键的最后几周，各队为争夺主要荣誉、欧冠资格和保级而战，这对整个大陆的联赛积分榜产生重大影响。
